name: ui-skills
description: Clone a live website into React + Tailwind. Splash-aware dual-snapshot extraction, SVG-as-text detection, hover completeness enforcement (inline style hover rules, data-text swap, video capture), smooth-scroll-compatible scroll capture, CSS-First generation with body scoping, anti-skip gates (validate-gate.sh blocks on missing hover rules, px leaks, scroll listeners). 3 skills, automated pipeline.
